name: Junk Bomb (Greater)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

This volatile-looking bomb is cobbled together from jagged metal scrap, broken glass, and other bits of razor-sharp fragments, lashed around a core of explosive alchemical slag. A junk bomb deals ] damage, ] damage, and )[slashing]]{3 slashing splash damage}.

You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.
